Recipient_age_No_GvHD.description: Recipient age for patients without GvHD. Same patients as Donor_age_No_GvHD, Type_No_GvHD, Preg_No_GvHD, and Index_No_GvHD.

Recipient_age_GvHD.description: Recipient age for patients with GvHD. Same patients as Donor_age_GvHD, Type_GvHD, Preg_GvHD, and Index_GvHD.

Donor_age_No_GvHD.description: Donor age for patients without GvHD. Same patients as Recipient_age_No_GvHD, Type_No_GvHD, Preg_No_GvHD, and Index_No_GvHD.

Donor_age_GvHD.description: Donor age for patients with GvHD. Same patients as Recipient_age_GvHD, Type_GvHD, Preg_GvHD, and Index_GvHD.

Type_No_GvHD.description: Type of leukemia for patients without GvHD (1=AML, 2=ALL, 3=CML). Same patients as Recipient_age_No_GvHD, Donor_age_No_GvHD, Preg_No_GvHD, and Index_No_GvHD.

Type_GvHD.description: Type of leukemia for patients with GvHD (1=AML, 2=ALL, 3=CML). Same patients as Recipient_age_GvHD, Donor_age_GvHD, Preg_GvHD, and Index_GvHD.

Preg_No_GvHD.description: Donor pregnancy status for patients without GvHD (0=No, 1=Yes). Same patients as Recipient_age_No_GvHD, Donor_age_No_GvHD, Type_No_GvHD, and Index_No_GvHD.

Preg_GvHD.description: Donor pregnancy status for patients with GvHD (0=No, 1=Yes). Same patients as Recipient_age_GvHD, Donor_age_GvHD, Type_GvHD, and Index_GvHD.

Index_No_GvHD.description: Mixed epidermal cell-lymphocyte reaction index for patients without GvHD; log-transformed in analysis. Same patients as Recipient_age_No_GvHD, Donor_age_No_GvHD, Type_No_GvHD, and Preg_No_GvHD.

Index_GvHD.description: Mixed epidermal cell-lymphocyte reaction index for patients with GvHD; log-transformed in analysis. Same patients as Recipient_age_GvHD, Donor_age_GvHD, Type_GvHD, and Preg_GvHD.

GvHD_status.description: GvHD group indicator: 0 = No GvHD (patients 1–20), 1 = GvHD (patients 21–37). This is the outcome variable defining the two groups being compared.
